paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.12, with a 1.16 percent change from the prior close and a -31.77 percent change over a window of 20 sessions. The price is as of July 20, 2026.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with the recent news including an announcement from Fermi Inc. regarding its second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, which was reported by FinanzNachrichten.de on July 20, 2026.

Fermi Inc. has 25 total filings, including 1 form 4 filing and 18 proxy solicitation filings, with recent filings including a SCHEDULE 13G and multiple 8-K filings, one of which disclosed the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031 and another which disclosed the resignation of director Miles Everson.
